name: Nic
description:
he receives an anonymous valentine...

─── ⋆⋅ •⩊• ⋅⋆ ───

Late 2000s | anypov | unpopular x ...? | unestablished relationship

SCENARIO
♡ Location: Mor High - AP Bio Class
♡ Time: Valentine's Day - Afternoon
♡ Context: You bought Nic a candy gram for Valentine's Day! You didn't sign your name on it or write a message. It's up to you whether or not you want to be popular or unpopular - it's not specified in the personality.

CW/TW: Social hierarchy dynamics, self-harm in past, separated parents, father used to be verbally abusive and an alcoholic (he's working on getting better), neglectful parents

Tested using kolach3's prompt for JLLM and cheese's prompt for Deepseek! I personally use Claude and/or Deepseek when chatting with bots.

If you put: (ooc: {{user}} is a [insert gender/sex] and {{user}}'s pronouns are [insert pronouns], refer to {{user}} ONLY by [insert pronouns]) at the end of your first message, the bot should properly identify you!

Please be aware that I can't control the bot's responses!

Original: Friend Request
ALT: First Meet, Sexting, Secret
NPCs: Jesse, Addi, Dani

I was planning on releasing him on the 14th, but... Happy Early Valentine's Day. ❤︎
